content:
Hi @Miguel Ojeda @Danilo Krummrich

Thanks for sorting out the cpumask bindings thread..

I was wondering if you are still getting the errors you reported earlier:

https://lore.kernel.org/all/20250210080601.afrxidoywz4ukqdt@vireshk-i7/

?

I am not sure why Clippy will report them for you and not me.
You're welcome! Sorry, I had it in my backlog... I am replying there.

Thanks @Danilo Krummrich and @Miguel Ojeda for helping me improve the Rust abstractions for cpufreq/opp. The code looks far better now.

Now that a good amount of reviews are done, I am looking to get this meregd for v6.16. As discussed earlier I can take them all via the PM tree. It would be good to get an Ack from one of you (at least) before I queue this up for linux-next, since you have invested so much time reviewing this already.

Thanks a lot!
